**What's real inside:** <!-- Name the actual algorithms implemented, e.g. "RK4-integrated double pendulum", "Jacobi pressure solve", "A* over a hex grid" -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Single self-contained `index.html` — zero external requests (works offline from `file://`)
- [ ] The claimed algorithm is genuinely implemented in the source
- [ ] Works at 390px width with touch input
- [ ] Understandable by a non-technical person within 5 seconds
- [ ] Card added to `index.html` + row added to `README.md` table
